items.title: Dear UnitedHealth Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for October 28
items.description: UnitedHealth Group investors are watching closely ahead of its October 28 update, with the healthcare giant preparing for a pivotal earnings reset that could define its 2026 rebound.

items.title: Elevance Shares Rise, and Fall, on Earnings. Medicaid Is a Worry.
items.description: The health insurer’s results looked strong at first glance, but the stock fell as management discussed margins in its Medicaid business.

items.title: Analysts Estimate UnitedHealth Group (UNH) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
items.description: UnitedHealth (UNH) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

items.title: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About UnitedHealth (UNH): Should You Buy?
items.description: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), UnitedHealth (UNH) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

items.title: These 3 Beaten-Down Healthcare Stocks Could Have Farther to Fall
items.description: Don't try to catch a falling surgical knife.
